name: business-name-titlecased-on-save
description: User types their business name in all-lowercase ('noman plumbing'). Bot must store the name with each word capitalized — 'Noman Plumbing' — not the lowercase verbatim text. Real tester report from May 2026: bot was echoing the lowercase string back into summaries and the generated site, looked like a typo to end users.
